name: synapse-ai-backend
description: Synapse AI — Microservice Backend (6 independent services)

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n log,auth,doc,ai,core,admin,gw -c gray,cyan,green,yellow,magenta,red,blue "cd log-server && npm run dev" "cd auth-server && npm run dev" "cd document-server && npm run dev" "cd ai-server && npm run dev" "cd core-server && npm run dev" "cd admin-server && npm run dev" "cd api-gateway-server && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: cd log-server && npm i && cd ../auth-server && npm i && cd ../document-server && npm i && cd ../ai-server && npm i && cd ../core-server && npm i && cd ../admin-server && npm i && cd ../api-gateway-server && npm i
